global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and a focus on the app's features.
global.main_message: Promoting the CloudRoute app for flexible booking options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular screenshot displaying an app interface with rounded elements, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Text in a clean font that reads 'Flexible booking options', positioned below the app screenshot.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold text that states 'Escape this weekend', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A light-colored background shape that adds depth, featuring rounded edges and a subtle design.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now', designed to attract attention and encourage action.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: An additional graphic element that complements the app screenshot, possibly a shape or icon.

elements.label: Main promotional message
elements.description: A large, bold headline that captures the main promotional message of the ad.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexin ions Install now

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: CloudRoute, app promotion, native format, modern and minimalistic, key elements include logo, app screenshot, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the app screenshot and body text, with the call to action button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CloudRoute, Escape this weekend, Flexible booking options, Install now
